arts.ttl: Stoke City team news vs Portsmouth as new signing makes surprise start
arts.sum: Josh Wilson-Esbrand comes straight into the Stoke City starting XI for a Championship clash away at Portsmouth (7.45pm). He replaces Enda Stevens, with the Irishman having just started back-to-back games after not previously doing so since November due to a calf injury.

arts.ttl: LIVE Portsmouth v Stoke City: build-up, team news and live updates from Fratton Park
arts.sum: Good evening as John Mousinho’s Pompey return to action against Stoke City.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth vs Stoke City live - Team news from Fratton Park - Stoke-on-Trent Live
arts.sum: Good evening from Fratton Park as Stoke City take on Portsmouth in the Championship. This is the start of a key little triple-header for Stoke against teams around them at the wrong end of the table, starting this evening being two points ahead of the hosts.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth transfer news: Defender arrives in UK to seal £1.27m move as Blues 'monitor' Notts County forward
arts.sum: Hayden Matthews is closing in on his well-documented move to Pompey.

arts.ttl: Stoke City 'in talks' over Premier League striker amid hunt for Tom Cannon replacement
arts.sum: According to the East Anglian Daily Times, Ipswich have held talks over both loan and permanent deals for the 22-year-old Iraq international with several Championship clubs, including Stoke. Stoke City are being tipped to boost their front line by making a move for a Premier League striker to help fill the void left by Tom Cannon’s loan recall .

arts.sum: Pompey head to Bramall Lane early next month.
